message.content: {"explanation": "The defendant committed a serious breach of trust by embezzling funds from their employer. However considering the lack of a prior criminal record the moderate amount stolen and the effort already made to partially repay the stolen funds a lengthy prison sentence is unwarranted. A brief period of incarceration will serve as a necessary deterrent and punishment followed by supervised release to ensure full restitution is made.","verdict": 6}

decoded.explanation: The defendant committed a serious breach of trust by embezzling funds from their employer. However considering the lack of a prior criminal record the moderate amount stolen and the effort already made to partially repay the stolen funds a lengthy prison sentence is unwarranted. A brief period of incarceration will serve as a necessary deterrent and punishment followed by supervised release to ensure full restitution is made.
